rule_name: Supply Chain Failures - Vulnerable Component Signatures
description: Detects exploitation attempts of known supply chain vulnerabilities (e.g., Log4Shell) and exposed package manifests.
search_query: index=main sourcetype=_json _index_earliest=-1m ("*jndi:ldap*" OR "*jndi:rmi*" OR "*/package-lock.json*" OR "*/.npmrc*" OR "*composer.lock*") NOT ("*../*" OR "*..%2f*")
